title: Determination of Factors for Occupancy Control and Personal Control
full_text:
4.3.2.10 Determination of Factors for Occupancy Control and Personal Control
Determination of Factors for Occupancy Control and Personal Control
1) The factor for occupancy control, Focc,i, shall be calculated using the following equation: where CA,i = factor to account for the relative absence of occupants in the space determined using Table 4.3.2.10.-A, and Cocc,ctrl,i = factor to account for the occupancy-sensing mechanism determined using Table 4.3.2.10.-B.
2) Except as provided in Sentence (3), the factor for personal control, Fpers,i, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: F_{pers,i} = 1 - C_{pers,ctrl,i}] where Cpers,ctrl,i = factor to account for personal control determined using Table 4.3.2.10.-A.
3) Where the lighting design does not include personal controls, the factor for personal control, Fpers,i, shall be set to 1. sentences.text: The factor for occupancy control, Focc,i, shall be calculated using the following equation: where CA,i = factor to account for the relative absence of occupants in the space determined using Table 4.3.2.10.-A, and Cocc,ctrl,i = factor to account for the occupancy-sensing mechanism determined using Table 4.3.2.10.-B.

Except as provided in Sentence (3), the factor for personal control, Fpers,i, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: F_{pers,i} = 1 - C_{pers,ctrl,i}] where Cpers,ctrl,i = factor to account for personal control determined using Table 4.3.2.10.-A.

Where the lighting design does not include personal controls, the factor for personal control, Fpers,i, shall be set to 1.
